title: Stigma Cobblemon
description: Stigma Cobblemon Modpack with integrated server.
body:
# 🌌 Join right away a welcoming, fun, and strong community!
Discover the **Stigma Cobblemon** server and begin a **brand new, one-of-a-kind adventure.**

## 📖 The Story

*[- In an unknown dimension, a peculiar egg hatched… **Stigma Eternatus was born**.  
When it awakened, its shriek mutated rare and powerful Pokémon — the ones we only hear about in the stories, the myths. -]*

## 🎯 Your Objective

Your final goal: **defeat them all, or catch them all.**  
You choose your destiny.

## 🧬 A Unique Pokémon Experience

Discover **new Pokémon and exclusive forms** that will spice up and shape your adventure.

Roam the world of **Stigma Cobblemon**, filled with:

- Side quests  
- Exploration  
- Server activities  

Major events will also take place from time to time.

---

## The server includes features like these

**All official Pokémon and 200+ Fakemon**  
Experience the full Pokémon roster alongside many custom creatures created specifically for the server.

**Legendary Summons**  
All legendary Pokémon can be summoned using special items found in structures or obtained through activities.

**Battle Mechanics**  
All battle gimmicks are enabled:  
**Mega Evolutions, Z-Moves, Dynamax, and Teracristallization.**

**Instanced Structure Loot**  
Structure chests are instanced, meaning every player receives their own loot when exploring.

**Player Driven Economy**  
The economy is entirely player-driven. Sell your Pokémon or items through the **GTS** or create your own shop.

**Pokédex Rewards**  
Receive rewards every **5% Pokédex completion**, including lifetime kits, nickname tags, and more.

**CobbleHunt**  
Hunt specific Pokémon with other players and claim rewards together.

**Raid Battles**  
Discover raids across the world where multiple players can challenge powerful Pokémon bosses.

**7★ Legendary Raids**  
The highest raid difficulty reaches **7★** — extremely difficult, but almost always legendary encounters.

**Expanded World Generation**  
Discover many new biomes and experience Minecraft exploration in a completely new way.

**Automatic Pokémon Release Rewards**  
When you release a Pokémon, the server automatically buys it from you.

**Storage & Backpacks**  
Use special chests and backpacks to store everything you need both in your base and in your inventory.

**Dynamic Musical System**  
Enjoy nostalgic music inspired by the **Nintendo DS era**, playing dynamically per biome and during battles.

**Battle UI Improvements**  
Experience an enhanced battle interface and improved summary screens with many quality-of-life upgrades.

**Battle Tower**  
Challenge the Battle Tower with multiple modes:  
**Solo, Duo, Trio, and Boss Battles** — playable alone or in co-op (up to 3 players).

**Reworked End Dimension**  
The End has been completely redesigned with unique terrain and no more repetitive islands.

**Mysterious Wormholes**  
Sometimes a wormhole will appear near you. Enter it to explore mysterious areas and discover hidden secrets.

---

# Special launch events will take place during the server opening

**First 100 Players Reward**  
The first 100 players to join the server will receive an additional reward on top of the welcome reward.

**Launch Tournament**  
If enough players are active during the first week, a tournament will be organized within the month.

**Mysterious Pokémon Appearance**  
Rumors say that a mysterious Pokémon may make a special appearance…

---

## 🤝 Join our community

**Discord**  
https://discord.gg/CwsGQGgjd9
